info.DAtuviSezaH: mAnbaDadAnSAnByo dIrGaScAByAsasya 3.1.6 ityanena asmAt DAtoH 'jijYAsAyAm' asmin arTe svArTe san-pratyayaH Bavati  'pUjAyAm' asmin arTe tu curAdigaRavat rUpARi Bavanti
info.english_meaning: to worship to investigateto examineto wish to know
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ( vicArArTe san ) ' pUjAyAM mAnayenmAne dyO mImAMseta taNsanoH ' (Slo. 126) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tasya nopamImAMsA'sti' ( Sa0 brA0 114212) upamImAMsA vicAraRA SaNkA vimarSaH
